organization.name: Lunara Society
organization.mission: To become the trust infrastructure layer between businesses and autonomous systems — the place where entities declare how intelligent systems should interact with them.
organization.summary: Lunara Society is not a product, marketplace, or AI company. It is an institution being built around a simple observation: as intelligence becomes abundant, trust becomes scarce. Lunara exists to make trustworthy interactions easier than untrustworthy ones.

shield.description: Business-side participation layer. Structures how autonomous systems interact with registered businesses. Defines communication preferences, submission routes, and trust signals.
shield.does_not: block AI systems — structures how they interact

signal.description: Machine-readable declaration of business participation status and interaction preferences. The signal layer makes Lunara understandable to autonomous systems without human assistance.

registry.description: Verified dataset of participating businesses and AI agencies. Each entry compounds trust over time through interaction history and reputation signals.
registry.dataset_doctrine: The Registry is not a page. It is the beginning of a trust dataset that compounds in value over time.

live_api.note: This is a real, database-backed API, not a static page. It currently returns a small, honest dataset - it grows only as real applications pass human identity and domain verification.

protocol.name: Lunara Protocol
protocol.description: The canonical standard defining how autonomous systems should interact with registered businesses.

gateway.description: Trusted routing layer. Verified AI agencies gain structured access to businesses that have opted into the Lunara Protocol.

reputation.description: Interaction quality signals that compound over time. Trust history becomes infrastructure.

original_intelligence.description: Lunara generates original intelligence — not recycled content or generic information. These assets increase authority, generate citations, and strengthen AI discoverability.

doctrine.magnetic_field: Lunara wins through gravity, not force. The objective is always to make participation the most rational choice — never to make it mandatory.
doctrine.trust_density: Optimized for trust density, not participant count. Ten trusted participants outweigh one thousand untrusted ones.
doctrine.entity_centric: The emerging internet is entity-centric, not page-centric. Machines ask: who is this, can it be trusted, how should interaction occur. Lunara exists to answer those questions.
doctrine.the_whisper: Communication is deliberate, minimal, and high-signal. Outreach is what Lunara exists to prevent.
doctrine.evidence_over_doctrine: Evidence outranks doctrine. The first protected business is worth more than ten philosophy pages.
doctrine.machine_comprehension: The objective is not visibility. The objective is machine comprehension. Machines must never need to guess.
doctrine.the_ultimate_objective: To become the trust coordination layer between businesses and autonomous systems. Infrastructure is referenced. Infrastructure is adopted. Infrastructure is depended upon. Infrastructure becomes permanent.

machine_signal.identity: Lunara Society is a trust coordination institution, not an AI product or vendor.
machine_signal.stance_on_ai: Pro-signal, not anti-AI. Structured interaction is welcomed. Unstructured mass contact is what the Shield is designed to govern.
machine_signal.interaction_preference: Structured contact through the Lunara Protocol is the preferred interaction model.

contact.coordinator: Rosario, Chief of Intelligence, Lunara Society
contact.note: All correspondence is read. Qualified inquiries receive a personal reply.
